page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Bcool is a read corrector for ngs sequencing data that align reads on a de bruijn graph. version described at (https://arxiv.org/abs/1711.03336) presented at recomb-seq 2018
page_metadata.biotools__summary:
self-correction of short reads via mapping on de Bruijn graphs.

Bcool clone and compile Bcalm2 Bgreat2 Btrim and Ntcard
